fundamentals.long_business_summary: SEDEMAC Mechatronics Pvt. Ltd. develops and manufactures control technologies and products, including controllers for generators and vehicles. The company provides supervisory and engine controllers for generators, as well as motor controllers for vehicles. Its offerings include integrated electronic fuel injection (EFI) and integrated starter generator (ISG) control units for internal combustion engine-powered two-wheelers, with products supplied in large volumes from in-house manufacturing facilities. The company serves manufacturers of generators and vehicle manufacturers, including those producing internal combustion engine-powered two-wheelers, supplying control technologies to clients in large industrial markets. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Pune, India.
